base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mushroom_platform_tile_palette0 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Hill/mushroom platform tile — appears in overworld/underwater/mushrooms/snow-mapping zones. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hill/mushroom platform tile — appears in overworld/underwater/mushrooms/snow-mapping zones; decorative + solid ground surface in mushroom zones
